title: Kimbe Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kimbe, with a Z-Score of +3.69. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level.
body:
The current heat wave in Kimbe has resulted in a high score of 10.0/10, indicating a severe anomaly. 
 The temperature has led to a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD) with a value of 11.9 GG, while the Humidity is at 78% and wind speed is 10.4 km/h. 
 The absence of Heating Degree Days (HDD) with a value of 0.0 GG further emphasizes the extreme heat conditions.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
